MAN B&W ·Engine

MAN B&W MC Series Spares

Spare parts for MAN B&W MC-series large-bore marine engines – piston rings, suction and puncture valves, cylinder liner, fuel pump components, and stuffing-box parts. Part-number prefixes (90201, 90302, 90801, 90803, etc.) span multiple bore sizes; quote with the engine model when requesting.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
90201-0201-060Piston ring No.1 (NPR;DARCAST Alu-coatGT CL RING)
90201-0201-072Piston ring No.2 and 4 (NPR; CF5 Alu-Coat, Left cut 8mm)
90201-0201-084Piston ring No.3 (NPR; CF5 Alu-Coat, Right cut)
90901-0206-759Suction valve, complete
90901-0206-747Puncture valve, complete
90901-0206-711Pump barrel, complete

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
